name: playful
description: Fun cooking moments including happy mistakes, colorful ingredient explosions, and the messy joy of getting creative in the kitchen. This mood says: cooking is play, not performance — and the best meals come from having fun.

style.lighting: bright cheerful daylight | even shadowless fill | pop of color lighting
style.color_grade: bright pastels | saturated primary colors | high key warmth
style.camera: overhead ingredient scatter | reaction shots | freeze-frame splashes
style.composition: organized ingredient chaos | rainbow color arrangements | hands-in-frame action
style.props: colorful silicone spatulas, bright bowls, scattered ingredients, fun apron, quirky timer

copy_tone: Bubbly and encouraging, celebrating kitchen experiments. Uses casual language, rhetorical questions, and gentle humor. Makes cooking mistakes feel like part of the adventure.

music.mood: cheerful indie pop, playful xylophone, upbeat

example_prompt_fragment: A fun overhead shot of a bright kitchen counter with colorful ingredients scattered in a rainbow arrangement, a pair of hands tossing fresh vegetables into a bright red mixing bowl, flour puff mid-air, cheerful bright lighting, saturated pastel color palette, playful and joyful food photography, approachable and fun editorial style
